reason: Successfully tested agent functionality: navigated to agent, verified status, sent math question, received correct response with "4" mentioned.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing sidebar with agent list including "QA-20260721-175117-hpnj" with idle status.
Clicked on "QA-20260721-175117-hpnj" agent in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent page at http://localhost:47891/agents/qa-20260721-175117-hpnj-rohx8te4bw.
Verified agent status — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the page header, meeting the requirement of "running" or "idle".
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully submitted using Cmd+Enter keyboard shortcut and new session created.
Waited for response — Agent responded within 1 second (far under the 3-minute limit) with "Worked for 1s" indicator.
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question, confirming correct functionality.
